title: Calibench submission
description: A leaderboard submission = calibration OUTPUTS + metadata. CI RE-RUNS the Calibench evaluation to compute the metrics; contributors do NOT submit scores. The calibration parameters follow the camcalib/output schema (single source of truth).

sequences.description: exact bag/sequence ids the calibration used

split.description: real = no absolute GT (GT-free metrics); simulation = scored vs Calibench's PRIVATE held-out GT

reproduce.description: How to reproduce the result. Required to earn the 'verified' badge.

calibration.description: The calibration OUTPUT(s) submitted, in the camcalib/output schema (camera + IMU intrinsics, cam-IMU R/t/dt, rolling-shutter readout, IMU-IMU R/t/dt, covariances). Provide a path to the output file(s) in the PR, or inline the object.

oneOf.description: relative path to output YAML/JSON in the submission PR

license.description: submitter relicenses the submission contents under CC-BY-4.0

cite.description: BibTeX keys the submitter agrees to cite (Calibench + the dataset used)
